title: rubus × semifimbrifolius
intro: Rubus × semifimbrifolius, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × semifimbrifolius include its ability to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
